sourceMovie.title: Wanted
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Audiences latched onto Wanted (2008) as a action theatrical experience: big enough for a group watch, specific enough to reward a second viewing once you know where it's headed. The action and thriller blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: John Wick: Chapter 3 - Parabellum
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Wanted clicked for you, John Wick: Chapter 3 - Parabellum (2019) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and thriller, with unease that lingers after the credits. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Wanted?
faq.answer: Try John Wick: Chapter 3 - Parabellum, The Mechanic, Extraction 2—each shares DNA with Wanted while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Wanted?
faq.answer: Wanted (2008) is best described as Action, Thriller, Crime. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Wanted worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.5/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this action lane.
